creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
I tried the viral strawberries in London,

so you don’t have to 🤠

Borough Market is awesome, but I’d definitely recommend going on a weekday if you’re in London for more than just a weekend as the market gets incredibly busy on the weekends 🫡

Here are a few cool spots near Borough Market: 

📍The George: a pub built in 1676 (!) that has a lovely beer garden 

📍Southwark Cathedral: only 50 metres from Borough Market you’ll find this stunning cathedral with lots of history (there’s been a church here for over 1000 years)

📍 St Dunstan in the East Church Garden: on the other side of the river, but this beautiful (bombed out) ruin of a church is definitely worth the walk 

Or just take a stroll along the Thames over to Tower Bridge and enjoy the view of one of Londons most iconic sights 🇬🇧
